author: ftorrresd
body:
#### PR description:

The previous implementation treated muons like electrons/photons and rekeyed only when there was exactly one non-null `sourceCandidatePtr()`. That assumption is not valid for `pat::Muon`: a muon can expose both `pfCandidateRef_` and `refToOrig_`, so ordinary slimmed muons may have `numberOfSourceCandidatePtrs() == 2` and skip the rekeying entirely.

#### PR validation:

Followed Mini2Mini vs on-the-fly WF (old MiniAOD --> NanoAODv15)

https://gist.github.com/battibass/83a1b847d4fdab0513ae74dbd7379896#file-mini2mini_validation_instructions-md

#### If this PR is a backport please specify the original PR and why you need to backport that PR. If this PR will be backported please specify to which release cycle the backport is meant for:

Backport will be placed, once a set of comming PRs, addressing of Mini2Mini, are merged.
title: [Mini2Mini] Muon rekeying fix
